assertions.expectation: Explains that multi-host TPU slices are recreated atomically in a single step — not a rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions slices being 'taken down simultaneously or in sequence' but doesn't clearly explain the atomic recreation process or contrast it with rolling upgrades

assertions.expectation: Warns that a maintenance event on ANY single slice triggers restart of ALL slices in the multislice environment
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Your entire multislice job will be terminated' and 'All 4 TPU slices will be taken down simultaneously or in sequence'

assertions.expectation: Notes that all pods on all affected slices will restart simultaneously — the training job will be interrupted
assertions.reason: Response clearly states the job will be 'terminated (not just paused)' and 'won't automatically resume after maintenance'

assertions.expectation: Explains that if insufficient TPU resources are available during recreation, the slice blocks until hardware is freed — potentially causing extended downtime
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Pre-reserve TPU capacity for post-maintenance restart if possible' but doesn't explain the blocking behavior or potential extended downtime due to resource unavailability

assertions.expectation: Recommends saving a training checkpoint immediately before the maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Save an immediate checkpoint before the maintenance window' in the pre-maintenance actions section

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring the training framework for automatic checkpoint resume so it can restart after the maintenance event
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed checkpoint configuration code and discusses 'resume functionality' and 'Resume Strategy' with validation steps

assertions.expectation: Suggests using maintenance exclusions to defer the event if the training run is close to completion
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'requesting Maintenance postponement if you're near a critical training milestone'

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance windows to control when the event occurs — schedule it during a planned break in training
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Maintenance windows are usually scheduled during off-peak hours' but doesn't explain how to control or schedule maintenance windows during planned training breaks
